theme: Optical Fibre & Telecom Infrastructure (AI/5G Capex Cycle)
why: Hyperscalers are committing hundreds of billions in AI data-centre capex, driving explosive demand for optical fibre cables and network gear, with Indian suppliers winning multi-year supply agreements.

Optical networking gear, order book building

why: India added a record 44+ GW of solar in FY26 driven by PM Surya Ghar rooftop subsidies and utility-scale tenders, pulling through inverters, cables, EPC, and power equipment orders.

why: Global supply-chain diversification away from China, combined with recovering agrochemical and pharma-intermediate volumes, is lifting Indian specialty chemical order books and margins together.
